title: elatostema frutescens var. novoguineense
intro: Elatostema frutescens var. novoguineense is a plant species belonging to the Urticaceae family, commonly found in the tropical regions of New Guinea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits associated with Elatostema frutescens var. novoguineense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Elatostema frutescens var. novoguineense can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
